info.description: The API serves the objective of retrieving balances for a specified set of accounts from the BBL so as to facilitate a data refresh in the Account Services API projection store.
info.title: Account Balances Interface - BBL

post.summary: This interface retrieves balances for a requested set of accounts to refresh projection store.

200.description: Balances and transactions and secondary accounts Fetch

post.summary: This interface retrieves static details of all Mutual Funds
This interface provides notification message that EOD has ended so that post Aggreagation entries can be posted

fundHouse.example: Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund

billDesc.example: Aut temporibus aut molestiae dolores harum.

available.description: Available Balance @availableBalance(Push Notification Message Interface) @Available balance(EOD Balance - CASA Accounts File Interface)

ledger.description: Ledger Balance @ledgerBalance(Push Notification Message Interface) @Ledger Balance(EOD Balance - CASA Accounts File Interface)

overDraftLimit.description: Overdraft limit is the maximum amount of credit that the bank extends to the corporate @odLimit(Push Notification Message Interface) @OD Limit(EOD Balance - CASA Accounts File Interface)

overDraftUsage.description: Amount overdrawn by the corporate @odLimit - @odAvailable (Push Notification Message Interface) @OD Limit - @OD Available (EOD Balance - CASA Accounts File Interface)

overDraftAvailable.description: The final presentment balances which reflects checks posting to account prior to actual posting @odAvailable(Push Notification Message Interface) @OD Available(EOD Balance - CASA Accounts File Interface)

outstandingBalance.description: Outstanding Balance for the account <missing>(Push Notification Message Interface) @Ledger Balance(EOD Balance - CASA Accounts File Interface)

floatYesterday.description: Float amount for a Cheque pending clearing that was deposited yesterday i.e. a day before the Current Business Date @yesterdayFloat (Push Notification Message Interface) @Yesterday Float(EOD Balance - CASA Accounts File Interface)

floatToday.description: Float amount for a Cheque pending clearing that was deposited today i.e. on the Current Business Date @todayFloat(Push Notification Message Interface) @Today Float(EOD Balance - CASA Accounts File Interface)

floatAmount.description: Float Amount of the account. The amount of money that is in transit between payments made by customers and the funds that are usable by the corporate @yesterdayFloat+@todayFloat (Push Notification Message Interface) @Ledger Balance(EOD Balance - CASA Accounts File Interface)

accruedInterestReceivable:.description: Accrued interest to be received by the Corporate for his savings account. Interest is paid out every 6 months to the Corporate user. @ledgerBalance(Push Notification Message Interface) @Ledger Balance(EOD Balance - CASA Accounts File Interface)

reservedAmount.description: Reserved amount of the account. Reserve amount serves many purpose in many context @ledgerBalance(Push Notification Message Interface) @Ledger Balance(EOD Balance - CASA Accounts File Interface)
